user_request: Create a two‑speaker TTS: older male, clear and precise voice, curious tone; young female, breathy intimate voice, mischievous tone. He says "Did you ever wonder how the stars form?" She replies "Only if you promise to keep the secret."
asr_transcription: Did you ever wonder how the stars form? Only if you promise to keep the secret.
asr_reference: Did you ever wonder how the stars form? Only if you promise to keep the secret.
